description.from: Shoots 12 arrows to random enemies and deals a total of ??? P.DMG.
description.to: Deals 161(1+0.3Skill Level)+70.7% of Attack Power as Physical Damage 12 times to a random enemy.

description.from: Upon attacking, summons 5 arrows that launch towards the enemy. Each arrow deals ??? P.DMG.
description.to: Summons 5 homing arrows that track enemies. On attack, consumes 1 arrow to deal 351(1+0.3Skill Level)+154.3% of Attack Power as additional Physical Damage.

description.from: Fires an arrow in a straight line, dealing P.DMG to all enemies in range based on the target's remaining HP. Deals a maximum of ??? P.DMG and knocks down the target. Against Bosses, deals additional ??? P.DMG that ignores DEF.
description.to: Deals up to 1530(1+0.3Skill Level)+671% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies in a line based on their remaining HP and knocks them down. This skill has an additional 500 Physical Defense Penetration, and if the target is a boss, deals an additional 765(1+0.3Skill Level)+335.5% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.

description.from: Upon attacking, increases ATK by ??? and Crit Chance by 100 for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 3 times.
description.to: After using a skill or Normal Attack, increases Attack by 24(1+0.3Skill Level) and Critical Hit Chance by 100 for 5 sec. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to 6 times. At maximum stacks, you cannot gain additional [Moonlight Arrow] during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 extra arrows that each deal 143% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.

dark.from: There is a 50% chance to inflict Stun for 1 sec.
dark.to: Has a 50% chance to stun enemies hit for 0.6 sec.

light.from: Ignores DEF when there is only 1 enemy.
Max stack number is changed to 5.
light.to: Attack Speed is increased by 8% per stack.

dark.from: At the beginning of each battle, increases ATK. This effect stacks up to max 10 times, and upon reaching 10 stacks, increases DMG dealt to bosses by 20%. This effect is irremovable.
dark.to: At the start of battle, Attack is increased by 10%. This Attack increase stacks up to 10 times, and at 10 stacks, damage dealt to bosses is increased by 20%. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.from: [Moonlight Flash] DMG is increased by {0}% and target takes 20% additional P.DMG for 10 sec.
description.to: [Moonlight Flash] Increases DMG by {0}%, and P.DMG the target takes by 20% for 10 sec.

description.from: [Moonlight Arrow] Increases ATK Spd by 100 and each stack increases DMG to Non-Hero enemies by {0}%.
description.to: [Moonlight Arrow] increases normal attack DMG by 50% and DMG to Non-Hero enemies by {0}% per stack.

description.from: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by {0} for 10 sec, and for the duration of skill, each auto attack fires an arrow that deals extra {1}% P.DMG.
description.to: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by {0}% for 10 sec, and during the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical Damage to the target. The additional damage can only occur once every 0.5 sec.
